mapper.insert: insert into t_asset_ledger (asset_name, asset_code, asset_no, asset_type, asset_sub_type, amount, invest_amount, asset_status, remark, asset_owner, update_time, update_by) values (#{assetName}, #{assetCode}, #{assetNo}, #{assetType}, #{assetSubType}, #{amount}, #{investAmount}, #{assetStatus}, #{remark}, #{assetOwner}, now(), #{updateBy})
mapper.update:
update t_asset_ledger
asset_name = #{assetName},
asset_code = #{assetCode},
asset_no = #{assetNo},
asset_type = #{assetType},
asset_sub_type = #{assetSubType},
amount = #{amount},
invest_amount = #{investAmount},
asset_status = #{assetStatus},
remark = #{remark},
asset_owner = #{assetOwner},
update_time = now(), update_by = #{updateBy}
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_asset_ledger where id in
#{item}
